/usr/bin/cc -g CMakeFiles/server.dir/app/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/app/src/core/core.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/app/src/core/reactor.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/app/src/core/pipeline.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/app/src/core/listener/listener.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/app/src/core/worker/worker.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/app/src/core/worker/dispatcher.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/app/src/core/worker/operator.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/app/src/core/worker/client.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/app/src/utils/socket_helper.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/app/src/utils/epoller.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/app/src/utils/time_helper.c.o -o bin/server  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../lib:/home/roman/HomeServer/build_dbg/lib" lib/libemlog.so.1.0.0 lib/libspsc_ring.a
